mechanism: Both represent hidden valuation channels during commodity inflation invisible in standard metrics (P/E, EV/EBITDA). Working capital consumes cash not visible on income statement; LIFO/FIFO distorts the income statement itself. Together they make EV/FCF the appropriate metric.
regime_dependence: Both activate during commodity price increases and reverse during decreases, though working capital release may lag price declines due to inventory cycle timing.
